case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JOSE SAMUEL HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-16-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSE SAMUEL HERNANDEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 SERVED MAY-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE SAMUEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: MARLEN RAMOS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE SAMUEL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,095.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE SAMUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE SAMUEL
